title: stephanotis brevisquama
intro: Stephanotis brevisquama is a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae, commonly known as a type of night-blooming jasmine. This plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and snake bites, due to its medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Stephanotis brevisquama include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Stephanotis brevisquama include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
